summary: DVLT remains the book's biggest risk (serial diluter with an unresolved CyberCatch share-issuance LOI stacked atop a live ATM and a $2B financing term sheet); note a correction from last cycle - the AVO/Calavo dilution already closed 5/28/26 and is priced in, it is no longer a forward risk.

UUUU.note: $300M shelf + active ATM; issued 3.04M shares for $54.4M in Q1 2026 (244.4M shares out, ~+20% YoY) — real ongoing dilution, though funded by solid uranium fundamentals and the Vacuumschmelze deal, not distress. No change this cycle.

DVLT.note: Serial diluter (855.6M shares out); $1B S-3 effective 3/25/26, $60M offering closed 5/5/26, Maxim ATM signed June 2026 (2.73M warrants to Maxim at $0.6325), non-binding $2B structured-financing term sheet (6/1/26) that could cede board control, AND a binding LOI (5/1/26) to acquire CyberCatch Holdings for ~49.9M new shares (CAD$136.8M) whose 45-day exclusivity expired ~6/15/26 with still no definitive agreement confirmed — status unresolved. New this cycle: 7/9/26 press release naming DVLT 'Exclusive Technology Partner' for something called the 'Mandela Digital'/'Mandela Dollar' — another hype-adjacent partnership announcement fitting the same promotional pattern as the prior meme-coin/tokenization/stablecoin JVs, no fundamental substance found. Already on the bot's own avoid list.

CAI.note: IPO lockup already passed without incident; $100M buyback authorized (anti-dilutive), no new secondary or shelf activity found. No change this cycle.

AVO.note: CORRECTION from last snapshot: the Calavo Growers acquisition already CLOSED 5/28/26 (Mission Produce issued 17,530,823 shares + ~$266M cash; Calavo delisted from Nasdaq ~6/8/26) — this was not 'imminent,' it is done and already reflected in the share count/price. No forward dilution risk remains from this deal; residual risk is ordinary post-merger integration, not a financing overhang.

NTSK.note: Ticker ambiguity resolved: held position matches Netskope Inc (NASDAQ:NTSK), a $5B cybersecurity company, not NetSol (NTWK) — fundamentally sound but off the small-cap thesis this bot is built around. No change this cycle.

flags.why: Definitive merger agreement with Serapha Bio signed 6/23/26 (upgraded from LOI) plus a $230M concurrent private placement; pre-merger BOLD holders retain only ~3.7% of the combined 'Serapha Bio, Inc.' (Nasdaq: AATD), own oncology pipeline halted, 75% workforce cut, close targeted Q4 2026. A shareholder-rights law firm announced a fiduciary-duty investigation into the BOLD board on 7/6/26 (routine post-merger solicitation, not confirmed wrongdoing, but consistent with the 'sell the news' distressed-merger read). Not a buyable catalyst.

Top radar candidate (5.93) but carries an active $100M ATM sales agreement since 2024 plus a Feb-2026 $100M underwritten offering (20M shares at $5) that is now underwater (stock $3.75) — dilution is live, not hypothetical. No new offering filing found this cycle.

Automatic S-3ASR shelf effective 1/13/26 already used twice via 424B5, plus an active $50M ATM program — ongoing drip-dilution setup. Currently below buy threshold (3.33) so moot for now, but flag if score rises.

dilution_watch.note: Non-binding term sheet for up to $2.0B structured financing in four $500M tranches at $1.55-2.00/share; full draw implies >50% dilution and board-control shift to counterparty.
New Maxim Group co-sales-agent ATM agreement signed; Maxim also received 2.73M warrants at $0.6325 strike — fresh drip-dilution mechanism on top of the $1B shelf.

Binding LOI to acquire CyberCatch Holdings for ~49.9M newly issued DVLT shares (~7.5% pro forma equity); 45-day exclusivity expired ~6/15/26 with no confirmed definitive agreement since — status unresolved, watch for either a lapse announcement or a signed deal.
$100M underwritten offering, 20M shares at $5.00; stock now trades below that price at $3.75. $100M ATM sales agreement (since 2024) remains active.
Definitive merger agreement with Serapha Bio plus $230M concurrent private placement; existing holders diluted to ~3.7% pro forma; close targeted Q4 2026.
Automatic shelf effective, used twice via 424B5; $50M ATM program active to fund natural-gas expansion.
3.04M shares issued for $54.4M under existing $300M shelf; share count 244.4M, up ~20% YoY.
S-4 for Calavo Growers acquisition; deal CLOSED 5/28/26 (17,530,823 new AVO shares issued + ~$266M cash); no longer a pending dilution event.

disagreements: intel.json (as of its 17:25Z snapshot) still dismisses the Mission Produce/Calavo acquisition as a 'recurring search-engine mixup' with 'no primary-source confirmation' — this is stale: the deal closed 5/28/26 (Mission Produce IR release + multiple SEC 8-K/425 filings confirm 17.5M shares issued, Calavo delisted). Update the read from 'noise' to 'closed, already priced in.'

intel.json carries no alert on DVLT this snapshot despite it being a held position with an active new ATM, a pending $2B financing that could cede board control, an unresolved CyberCatch acquisition LOI, and a fresh 7/9/26 hype-partnership press release — this deserves an active warning every cycle it remains held.
intel.json flags NTSK as an unresolved 'ticker ambiguity' — the held position resolves to Netskope (NASDAQ:NTSK), a $5B cybersecurity company, fundamentally sound but off the small-cap thesis.
